title: Full deterministic oncology corpus build from snapshot
context: M1's capstone: scale from the M0 pilot to the full C04 oncology corpus, running the complete hardened pipeline (patient-content detector, pinned-snapshot ingestion, full MeSH C04 query) deterministically. The manifest hash must be recorded and reproducible. This is the first release-quality full corpus. Depends on patient-008, snapshot-009, query-003, and bundle-005 all being complete and CI-green.
objective: Run the full deterministic oncology corpus build from a pinned snapshot using the complete M1 pipeline: apply gate-002 and patient-008 across all C04 articles, build per-tier bundles, emit per-bundle LICENSE manifests and a datasheet, record the manifest content hash, and produce a committed audit artifact showing 0 tier/patient-content leakage and 100% provenance.
acceptanceCriteria: Full C04 oncology corpus built deterministically from a pinned snapshot; the manifest content hash is recorded and reproduces byte-identically on a clean rebuild.

gate-002 (license tiering) and patient-008 (patient-content detector) applied across every article in the build; the committed audit artifact shows 0 tier leakage and 0 patient-content leakage in redistributable bundles.
Provenance is 100% complete on every included record: PMCID, PMID, DOI, sourceService, retrievedAt, snapshotVersion, meshVersion, license id + URL + snapshotRef, attribution.
Per-tier bundles (commercial, non-commercial, no-derivatives, metadata-only) and per-bundle LICENSE manifests emitted.
A Datasheet-for-Datasets (composition, collection, uses, limitations, guardrails) is produced and committed alongside the manifest.
License+compliance reviewer and technical reviewer sign off before the corpus is published or submitted.
output: A full oncology corpus release: manifest JSON + license-segregated bundles + per-bundle LICENSE manifests + datasheet + committed gate audit artifact, with manifest content hash recorded and reviewer sign-offs documented.
